title: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space
titleZh: 词向量空间中的高效估计
introZh: 提出 Word2Vec 模型，通过连续词袋和 Skip-gram 架构高效学习高质量词向量，奠定了词嵌入在 NLP 中的基础地位。
introEn: Proposes Word2Vec, using CBOW and Skip-gram to learn high-quality word embeddings efficiently, laying the foundation for word representation in NLP.

title: Rich feature hierarchies for accurate object detection and semantic segmentation
titleZh: 用于精确目标检测和语义分割的丰富特征层次
introZh: 提出 R-CNN，将卷积神经网络应用于区域提议，实现高精度目标检测，是深度学习目标检测的开创性工作。
introEn: Introduces R-CNN, applying CNNs to region proposals for accurate object detection, a pioneering work in deep learning-based detection.

title: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes
titleZh: 自编码变分贝叶斯
introZh: 提出变分自编码器（VAE），将变分推断与神经网络结合，开创了深度生成模型的新范式。
introEn: Proposes the Variational Autoencoder (VAE), merging variational inference with neural networks, pioneering deep generative models.

title: Generative Adversarial Nets
titleZh: 生成对抗网络
introZh: 提出 GAN，通过生成器与判别器的对抗训练生成逼真数据，是生成模型领域的里程碑。
introEn: Introduces GANs, using adversarial training between generator and discriminator to create realistic data, a milestone in generative models.

title: Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate
titleZh: 通过联合学习对齐和翻译的神经机器翻译
introZh: 提出注意力机制，允许模型在翻译时动态对齐源语言，显著提升神经机器翻译性能。
introEn: Introduces the attention mechanism for dynamic alignment in translation, significantly improving neural machine translation.

title: Very Deep Convolutional Networks for Large-Scale Image Recognition
titleZh: 用于大规模图像识别的极深卷积网络
introZh: 提出 VGGNet，通过堆叠小卷积核构建深层网络，验证了深度对视觉识别的重要性。
introEn: Proposes VGGNet, using stacked small convolutional filters to build deep networks, demonstrating the importance of depth in vision.

title: Sequence to Sequence Learning with Neural Networks
titleZh: 基于神经网络的序列到序列学习
introZh: 提出 Seq2Seq 框架，使用编码器-解码器架构处理变长序列，是序列生成任务的基础。
introEn: Introduces the Seq2Seq framework with encoder-decoder architecture for variable-length sequences, foundational for sequence generation.

title: Fully Convolutional Networks for Semantic Segmentation
titleZh: 用于语义分割的全卷积网络
introZh: 提出 FCN，将全连接层替换为卷积层实现像素级预测，是深度学习语义分割的开山之作。
introEn: Proposes FCN, replacing fully connected layers with convolutions for pixel-wise prediction, pioneering deep learning semantic segmentation.

title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
titleZh: Adam：一种随机优化方法
introZh: 提出 Adam 优化器，结合动量和自适应学习率，成为深度学习中最广泛使用的优化算法。
introEn: Introduces Adam optimizer, combining momentum and adaptive learning rates, becoming the most widely used optimization algorithm in deep learning.

title: Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training by Reducing Internal Covariate Shift
titleZh: 批归一化：通过减少内部协变量偏移加速深度网络训练
introZh: 提出 Batch Normalization，通过归一化层输入加速训练并提升稳定性，是训练深度网络的关键技术。
introEn: Proposes Batch Normalization, normalizing layer inputs to accelerate training and improve stability, a key technique for deep networks.

title: U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation
titleZh: U-Net：用于生物医学图像分割的卷积网络
introZh: 提出 U-Net，采用对称编码-解码结构，在少量数据下实现精确分割，成为医学图像分割的标杆。
introEn: Introduces U-Net with symmetric encoder-decoder for precise segmentation with limited data, a benchmark in medical image segmentation.

title: SSD: Single Shot MultiBox Detector
titleZh: SSD：单次多框检测器
introZh: 提出 SSD，实现单次前向传播的多尺度目标检测，在速度与精度间取得良好平衡。
introEn: Proposes SSD for single-shot multi-scale object detection, achieving a good balance between speed and accuracy.

title: You Only Look Once: Unified, Real-Time Object Detection
titleZh: YOLO：统一实时目标检测
introZh: 提出 YOLO，将检测视为回归问题，实现端到端实时目标检测，极大提升检测速度。
introEn: Introduces YOLO, framing detection as a regression problem for real-time end-to-end detection, dramatically improving speed.

title: A Neural Algorithm of Artistic Style
titleZh: 一种艺术风格的神经算法
introZh: 提出神经风格迁移，利用卷积网络分离内容与风格，开创了图像风格化领域。
introEn: Proposes neural style transfer, using CNNs to separate content and style, pioneering the field of image stylization.

title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
titleZh: 用于图像识别的深度残差学习
introZh: 提出 ResNet，通过残差连接解决深层网络退化问题，使训练超深网络成为可能。
introEn: Introduces ResNet with residual connections to solve degradation in deep networks, enabling training of ultra-deep networks.

title: Image-to-Image Translation with Conditional Adversarial Networks
titleZh: 基于条件对抗网络的图像到图像翻译
introZh: 提出 Pix2Pix，使用条件 GAN 实现通用图像翻译，统一了多种图像生成任务。
introEn: Proposes Pix2Pix, using conditional GANs for general-purpose image-to-image translation, unifying various image generation tasks.

title: Attention Is All You Need
titleZh: 注意力就是一切
introZh: 提出 Transformer，完全基于注意力机制，取代 RNN 成为 NLP 主流架构，是现代大模型的基础。
introEn: Introduces Transformer, relying entirely on attention, replacing RNNs as the dominant NLP architecture and foundation of modern LLMs.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
titleZh: BERT：深度双向 Transformer 的预训练
introZh: 提出 BERT，通过掩码语言模型实现深度双向预训练，刷新多项 NLP 基准。
introEn: Proposes BERT with masked language modeling for deep bidirectional pretraining, achieving state-of-the-art on multiple NLP benchmarks.

title: A Style-Based Generator Architecture for Generative Adversarial Networks
titleZh: 基于风格的生成对抗网络生成器架构
introZh: 提出 StyleGAN，通过风格控制实现高质量、可解释的图像生成，是 GAN 图像生成的里程碑。
introEn: Introduces StyleGAN, enabling high-quality, interpretable image generation through style control, a milestone in GAN-based generation.

title: RoBERTa: A Robustly Optimized BERT Pretraining Approach
titleZh: RoBERTa：一种鲁棒优化的 BERT 预训练方法
introZh: 提出 RoBERTa，通过更长的训练、更大的数据和动态掩码优化 BERT，提升预训练效果。
introEn: Proposes RoBERTa, optimizing BERT with longer training, more data, and dynamic masking, improving pretraining performance.

title: DistilBERT, a distilled version of BERT: smaller, faster, cheaper and lighter
titleZh: DistilBERT：BERT 的蒸馏版本——更小、更快、更便宜、更轻
introZh: 提出 DistilBERT，通过知识蒸馏将 BERT 压缩 40%，同时保留 97% 性能，推动模型轻量化。
introEn: Introduces DistilBERT, compressing BERT by 40% via knowledge distillation while retaining 97% performance, advancing model compression.

title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with a Unified Text-to-Text Transformer
titleZh: 探索统一文本到文本 Transformer 的迁移学习极限
introZh: 提出 T5，将所有 NLP 任务统一为文本到文本格式，展示了大规模预训练的通用性。
introEn: Proposes T5, unifying all NLP tasks into a text-to-text format, demonstrating the versatility of large-scale pretraining.

title: Momentum Contrast for Unsupervised Visual Representation Learning
titleZh: 用于无监督视觉表示学习的动量对比
introZh: 提出 MoCo，利用动量编码器和动态字典实现高效无监督对比学习，推动自监督视觉发展。
introEn: Introduces MoCo, using momentum encoder and dynamic dictionary for efficient unsupervised contrastive learning, advancing self-supervised vision.

title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
titleZh: 神经语言模型的缩放定律
introZh: 提出缩放定律，揭示模型性能随参数、数据和计算量呈幂律增长，指导大模型设计。
introEn: Proposes scaling laws, showing model performance follows power-law growth with parameters, data, and compute, guiding LLM design.

title: NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis
titleZh: NeRF：将场景表示为神经辐射场用于视图合成
introZh: 提出 NeRF，用神经网络隐式表示 3D 场景，实现高质量新视角合成，革新神经渲染。
introEn: Introduces NeRF, using neural networks for implicit 3D scene representation, enabling high-quality novel view synthesis, revolutionizing neural rendering.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
titleZh: 面向知识密集型 NLP 任务的检索增强生成
introZh: 提出 RAG，结合检索与生成，利用外部知识提升语言模型在知识密集型任务上的表现。
introEn: Proposes RAG, combining retrieval with generation to leverage external knowledge, improving LLM performance on knowledge-intensive tasks.

title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
titleZh: 语言模型是小样本学习者
introZh: 提出 GPT-3，展示大规模语言模型通过上下文学习即可完成多种任务，无需微调。
introEn: Introduces GPT-3, demonstrating that large language models can perform diverse tasks via in-context learning without fine-tuning.

title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
titleZh: 去噪扩散概率模型
introZh: 提出 DDPM，通过逐步去噪生成高质量数据，奠定了现代扩散模型的理论基础。
introEn: Proposes DDPM, generating high-quality data through iterative denoising, laying the theoretical foundation for modern diffusion models.

title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
titleZh: 一张图像等于 16x16 个词：用于大规模图像识别的 Transformer
introZh: 提出 ViT，将图像分割为块并应用 Transformer，证明纯注意力机制在视觉任务上的有效性。
introEn: Introduces ViT, applying Transformers to image patches, demonstrating the effectiveness of pure attention in vision tasks.

title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
titleZh: 从自然语言监督中学习可迁移的视觉模型
introZh: 提出 CLIP，通过图文对比学习实现零样本迁移，连接视觉与语言，推动多模态发展。
introEn: Proposes CLIP, using image-text contrastive learning for zero-shot transfer, bridging vision and language, advancing multimodal AI.

title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows
titleZh: Swin Transformer：使用移位窗口的分层视觉 Transformer
introZh: 提出 Swin Transformer，通过移位窗口实现分层特征提取，成为视觉骨干网络的新范式。
introEn: Introduces Swin Transformer with shifted windows for hierarchical feature extraction, becoming a new paradigm for vision backbones.

title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
titleZh: LoRA：大语言模型的低秩适应
introZh: 提出 LoRA，通过低秩矩阵微调大模型，大幅降低参数量和计算成本，成为参数高效微调标准。
introEn: Proposes LoRA, fine-tuning large models via low-rank matrices, drastically reducing parameters and compute, becoming a standard for PEFT.

title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
titleZh: 基于潜在扩散模型的高分辨率图像合成
introZh: 提出 Latent Diffusion，在潜在空间进行扩散生成，实现高效高分辨率文生图，是 Stable Diffusion 的基础。
introEn: Introduces Latent Diffusion, performing diffusion in latent space for efficient high-resolution text-to-image generation, basis of Stable Diffusion.

title: Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models
titleZh: 训练计算最优的大语言模型
introZh: 提出 Chinchilla 缩放定律，发现模型和数据应等比例缩放，指导大模型训练的资源分配。
introEn: Proposes Chinchilla scaling laws, showing model and data should scale equally, guiding resource allocation for LLM training.

title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
titleZh: 通过人类反馈训练语言模型遵循指令
introZh: 提出 InstructGPT，使用人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）对齐模型，使语言模型更好地遵循用户指令。
introEn: Introduces InstructGPT, using RLHF to align language models with human intent, enabling better instruction following.

title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways
titleZh: PaLM：使用 Pathways 扩展语言建模
introZh: 提出 PaLM，基于 Pathways 系统训练 5400 亿参数模型，展示大规模稀疏激活的有效性。
introEn: Proposes PaLM, a 540B-parameter model trained on Pathways, demonstrating the effectiveness of large-scale sparse activation.

title: FlashAttention: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention with IO-Awareness
titleZh: FlashAttention：快速且内存高效的 IO 感知精确注意力
introZh: 提出 FlashAttention，通过 IO 感知算法加速注意力计算，显著提升 Transformer 训练和推理效率。
introEn: Introduces FlashAttention, an IO-aware algorithm accelerating attention computation, significantly improving Transformer training and inference efficiency.

title: DreamBooth: Fine Tuning Text-to-Image Diffusion Models for Subject-Driven Generation
titleZh: DreamBooth：面向主体驱动的文本到图像扩散模型微调
introZh: 提出 DreamBooth，通过少量图像微调扩散模型，实现个性化主体生成，推动定制化文生图。
introEn: Proposes DreamBooth, fine-tuning diffusion models with few images for personalized subject generation, advancing customized text-to-image.

title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
titleZh: ReAct：在语言模型中协同推理与行动
introZh: 提出 ReAct，结合推理轨迹与行动步骤，增强语言模型在交互任务中的决策能力。
introEn: Introduces ReAct, combining reasoning traces with action steps, enhancing LLM decision-making in interactive tasks.

title: Scaling Instruction-Finetuned Language Models
titleZh: 扩展指令微调的语言模型
introZh: 提出 Flan 系列，通过大规模指令微调提升模型泛化能力，验证了指令数据的缩放效应。
introEn: Proposes Flan series, scaling instruction fine-tuning to improve generalization, validating the scaling effect of instruction data.

title: Self-Instruct: Aligning Language Models with Self-Generated Instructions
titleZh: Self-Instruct：用自生成指令对齐语言模型
introZh: 提出 Self-Instruct，通过模型自生成指令数据实现对齐，降低对人工标注的依赖。
introEn: Introduces Self-Instruct, aligning language models using self-generated instruction data, reducing reliance on human annotation.

title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models
titleZh: LLaMA：开放高效的基础语言模型
introZh: 提出 LLaMA，通过仅使用公开数据训练高性能模型，推动开源大模型生态发展。
introEn: Proposes LLaMA, training high-performance models on public data only, advancing the open-source LLM ecosystem.

title: GPT-4 Technical Report
titleZh: GPT-4 技术报告
introZh: 发布 GPT-4，展示多模态能力和接近人类水平的性能，是前沿大模型的代表。
introEn: Releases GPT-4, demonstrating multimodal capabilities and near-human performance, representing the frontier of large models.

title: Segment Anything
titleZh: 分割万物
introZh: 提出 SAM，通过提示实现通用图像分割，零样本迁移到新任务，是分割领域的里程碑。
introEn: Introduces SAM, enabling prompt-based universal image segmentation with zero-shot transfer, a milestone in segmentation.

title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models
titleZh: 思维树：用大语言模型进行深思熟虑的问题求解
introZh: 提出 Tree of Thoughts，扩展思维链为树状搜索，提升语言模型在复杂推理任务上的表现。
introEn: Proposes Tree of Thoughts, extending chain-of-thought to tree search, improving LLM performance on complex reasoning tasks.

title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs
titleZh: QLoRA：量化 LLM 的高效微调
introZh: 提出 QLoRA，结合量化与 LoRA，在 4-bit 精度下高效微调大模型，降低硬件门槛。
introEn: Introduces QLoRA, combining quantization with LoRA for efficient 4-bit fine-tuning of large models, lowering hardware requirements.

title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
titleZh: 直接偏好优化：你的语言模型秘密地是一个奖励模型
introZh: 提出 DPO，直接从偏好数据优化语言模型，简化 RLHF 流程，提升对齐效率。
introEn: Proposes DPO, directly optimizing language models from preference data, simplifying RLHF and improving alignment efficiency.

title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
titleZh: Mamba：基于选择性状态空间的线性时间序列建模
introZh: 提出 Mamba，引入选择性状态空间模型，实现线性时间序列建模，挑战 Transformer 的主导地位。
introEn: Introduces Mamba, using selective state space models for linear-time sequence modeling, challenging Transformer dominance.

title: Mixtral of Experts
titleZh: Mixtral of Experts
introZh: 提出 Mixtral 8x7B，采用混合专家架构，在保持推理效率的同时提升模型容量和性能。
introEn: Proposes Mixtral 8x7B, using mixture-of-experts architecture to increase model capacity and performance while maintaining inference efficiency.

title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
titleZh: DeepSeek-R1：通过强化学习激励 LLM 的推理能力
introZh: 提出 DeepSeek-R1，通过强化学习激发语言模型的推理能力，实现类似 o1 的深度思考。
introEn: Introduces DeepSeek-R1, using reinforcement learning to incentivize reasoning in LLMs, achieving deep thinking similar to o1.
